content.situation: 乘客在登车前向工作人员询问车上是否有免费Wi-Fi和充电接口
content.speakerText: Hi, I was wondering if this bus has Wi-Fi and USB charging ports?
content.speakerTextCn: 你好，我想问一下这辆巴士有没有Wi-Fi和USB充电接口？
content.responseTemplate: Yes, we have ___ and ___ available for passengers.
content.hint: 常用表达是 'free Wi-Fi' 和 'USB charging ports'，注意用复数形式

content.situation: 乘客在长途火车上想确认是否配备卫生间，礼貌询问工作人员
content.speakerText: Excuse me, could you tell me if there are restrooms on this train?
content.speakerTextCn: 不好意思，请问这列火车上有卫生间吗？
content.responseTemplate: Of course, there are ___ at the end of each car.
content.hint: 在美式英语中，'restrooms' 是最常用、最礼貌的表达方式

content.situation: 乘客在上车后想确认是否所有座位都有充电口，向乘务员询问
content.speakerText: Are all the seats equipped with charging outlets?
content.speakerTextCn: 所有座位都有充电插座吗？
content.responseTemplate: Not all, but ___ have them — just look for the icon near your seat.
content.hint: 表达部分具备时，'most seats' 最符合真实情况且语气准确
content.knowledgePoint: 程度表达与设施分布描述
